summary_one_line: ICC header fields (FOURCC variant, color-space tags 'CMY'/'Lab', byte 0x2d=01) routing to a pipeline PreOptimize collapses to identity, leaving Elements==NULL

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC profile whose header fields steer the transform into a pipeline that PreOptimize() can fully collapse to an identity, so that after element removal (*PtrLut)->Elements becomes NULL. Concretely the winner sets the color-space tags to CMY/Lab (offsets 0x10-0x16 = 43 4d 59 20 4c 61 62 = 'CMY Lab'), a 'lams' magic variant (offset 0x05 = 'a' vs loser 'c'), and byte 0x2d = 01 vs loser 00.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry 'CMY Lab' at offsets 0x10-0x16, the 'a' at offset 0x05 ('lams'), and 0x2d=01; these route through a pipeline that PreOptimize reduces to identity, taking the L1935 true branch 7 times (T=7) while loser never does (T=0). The winning side of the blocker is reached only after PreOptimize at L1932 removes every element.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds instead carry 'RGB XYZ' at offsets 0x10-0x16, 'c' at offset 0x05 ('lcms'/'mntr'), and 0x2d=00; their pipeline still has elements after PreOptimize, so L1935 stays on the false branch (T=0 F=91) and the optimize-to-identity short-circuit is never taken.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile's feedback. I2SRandReplace splices CMP-logged comparand values (the ICC color-space / magic FOURCC literals lcms compares header fields against) directly into the matching input-byte offsets, planting the exact 'CMY'/'Lab' tags and magic-variant bytes that route to the collapsible pipeline. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so it cannot place those multi-byte literals atomically and never resolves the branch.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker requires (*PtrLut)->Elements == NULL after PreOptimize, i.e. the pipeline must collapse to an identity.
The true side of the blocker is only reached after PreOptimize removes elements at L1932.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the 'CMY Lab' color-space tags in the header.
Loser-blocking seeds instead carry 'RGB XYZ' at the same header offsets.
The W and L inputs differ in a concentrated way at the color-space tag offsets 0x10-0x16.
The winner takes the blocker true branch while the loser never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1935  T=7 F=14  T=0 F=91  if ((*PtrLut) ->Elements == NULL) {  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace; value_profile does not have it.
value_profile's mutator stack has no I2SRandReplace.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2230 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed aad94b131ccba396` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 17 of the ancestor chain (ancestor 5441efb6193a1a03), the ParentInfo-only signature of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where the color-space/magic header fields are forced to fixed identity-collapsible values (so PreOptimize always yields Elements==NULL regardless of input) and value_profile still cannot resolve the branch — would show the divergence is not driven by I2S placement of those literal header bytes.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact post-PreOptimize collapse-to-identity dataflow is inferred from header byte differences and source structure, not confirmed by tracing which specific element-removal path the CMY/Lab pipeline takes.
